summary: Iteration 46 - Subscription Tier System Testing. All 25 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified. 3 subscription plans (Free/Rise/Pro) with correct revenue shares (20%/10%/0%), prices ($0/$9.99/$19.99), and max_releases (1/-1/-1). Pricing page displays all plan cards, revenue comparison bars, feature checklists with check/X marks, BEST VALUE badge on Pro, and Why Go Pro section with $800/$900/$1,000 comparison. Sidebar shows lock icons for Free users on premium features, PRO badge for Pro users, and Upgrade CTA for non-Pro users. Locked items redirect to /pricing.

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions when page first loads - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality (same as previous iterations)

max_releases field properly set (free=1, rise=-1, pro=-1)

seed_data_creation: Created test user test_free_user_iter46@test.com with free plan. Upgraded admin@tunedrop.com to pro plan.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 46 tested the subscription tier system. SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS in backend has 3 tiers: free (20% revenue share, 1 release/year), rise ($9.99/mo, 10% share, unlimited), pro ($19.99/mo, 0% share, unlimited). The /api/subscriptions/plans endpoint returns all plans. The /api/subscriptions/my-plan returns current user's plan with locked_features list. The pricing page (/pricing) is public and shows all 3 plan cards with revenue comparison bars, feature checklists, and Why Go Pro section. The sidebar in DashboardLayout shows lock icons for features not available on current plan, plan badge next to username, and Upgrade CTA for non-Pro users. Locked sidebar items redirect to /pricing.

subscription_plans_api.get_plans: GET /api/subscriptions/plans returns all 3 plans with revenue_share, price, max_releases, features, locked
subscription_plans_api.get_my_plan: GET /api/subscriptions/my-plan returns current plan with locked_features
subscription_plans_api.checkout: POST /api/subscriptions/checkout creates Stripe checkout for paid plans

pricing_page.plan_cards: 3 cards with Free/Rise/Pro, correct prices and revenue shares
pricing_page.feature_checklists: Green checks for included, red X for excluded
pricing_page.best_value_badge: Pro plan has BEST VALUE badge and gold border

sidebar_feature_gating.lock_icons: Visible for locked features on Free/Rise plans
